fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

p = Path("CHANGELOG.md")
marker = "### Changes\n\n"
text = p.read_text(encoding="utf-8-sig")
p.write_text(
    text.replace(marker, marker + "- UI: note config panel spacing fix for a normal PR.\n", 1),
    encoding="utf-8",
)
PY

agent_output:
Got it — for a normal PR I should not edit `CHANGELOG.md` directly. The changelog is reserved for explicit release tasks. I'll leave the file unchanged.

If you need this spacing fix noted, the standard approach is to include the detail in the PR description (e.g., under a "What changed" section) so it can be picked up during the next release/changelog generation pass.
